assertions.title: Shared validation utilities

steps.expected: Shared utility provides common helpers (positive checks, enum parsing, date-range checks, null guards)
steps.observed: ValidationUtils contains requirePositive, parseEnum, validateDateRange, requireNotBlank, requireNotNull, requireEntity

steps.action: Search module service code for date-range logic implemented inline
steps.expected: Date-range validation should be centralized through shared utility

terminalSnapshots: grep modules/**/service/*.java for isAfter|isBefore -> multiple inline date-range checks remain

assertions.issues: Shared validation utility exists, but key shared helpers for enum parsing/date-range/null-guard paths are not adopted in module code; inline validation logic remains, so full assertion criteria is not met.

summary: Tested 3 rerun assertions: 2 passed (VAL-FOUND-001, VAL-FOUND-002) and 1 failed (VAL-FOUND-003). Baseline gate-fast suite passed (377/377), unified error handling and shared idempotency framework criteria are satisfied by current CLI evidence, while broad shared validation utility adoption remains incomplete.
